name: AVENUE THERAPEUTICS, INC.
business: Avenue Therapeutics, Inc. is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of therapies for the treatment of neurologic diseases. Its product candidates are ATX-04, a selective β2-adrenergic agonist for Pompe disease, and intravenous tramadol, a Schedule IV opioid for the treatment of post-operative acute pain. The company has no drug products approved for commercial sale.

exposures.sentence: Our current product candidates are ATX-04, a selective 2-adrenergic agonist for Pompe disease, intravenous tramadol ( IV tramadol ), a schedule IV opioid for the treatment of post-operative acute pain and previously, through November 5, 2025, BAER-101 for the treatment of epilepsy and panic disorders.

catalysts.event: Pre-IND meeting with FDA regarding pivotal study design for Pompe disease
catalysts.sentence: Based on this data, Avenue is currently preparing a pre-IND meeting to align with the FDA regarding a pivotal study design for Pompe disease, and subsequent to that meeting, will seek to raise the necessary capital to fund the pivotal study and initiate the trial.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 safety study for IV tramadol
catalysts.sentence: The initiation of the study is subject to the Company obtaining the necessary financing or partnership.

tamClaims.claim: Pompe disease has an estimated prevalence of approximately 1 in 20,000 to 1 in 30,000 individuals and we estimate that there are approximately 25,000 to 35,000 patients across the United States and Europe.
tamClaims.sentence: Pompe disease has an estimated prevalence of approximately 1 in 20,000 to 1 in 30,000 individuals and we estimate that there are approximately 25,000 to 35,000 patients across the United States and Europe.
